zh.Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Drury於大約1522年出生在英國素福爾可盧加姆時，她的父親John Drury44歲，母親Elizabeth Goldingham14歲。她於大約1552年與Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry在英國素福爾可賀瑟特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年10月24日在英國英格蘭享年74歲。

zh-hans.Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdo: 英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Drury于大约1522年出生在英国素福爾可盧加姆时，她的父亲John Drury44岁，母亲Elizabeth Goldingham14岁。她于大约1552年与Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry在英国素福爾可賀瑟特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年10月24日在英国英格兰享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Drury was born about 1522, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, her father, John Drury, was 44 and her mother, Elizabeth Goldingham, was 14. She married Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry about 1552, in Hessett, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 24 October 1595, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Drury est née environ 1522, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Drury, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Goldingham, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry environ 1552, à Hessett, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 octobre 1595, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Drury um 1522 in Rougham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Drury 44 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Goldingham 14. Sie hat um 1552 in Hessett, Suffolk, England Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Oktober 1595 im Alter von 74 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Drury è nata il circa 1522 nel Rougham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Drury, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Goldingham, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry circa 1552, nel Hessett, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1595, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Druryが約1522年にイギリススフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父John Druryは44歳，母Elizabeth Goldinghamは14歳であった。約1552年にイギリススフォルクヘセットでSir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年10月24日にイギリスイギリスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Drury(이)가 대략 1522년 영국 수폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Drury(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Goldingham(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1552년 영국 수폴크 헤싯에서 Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 10월 24일 영국 잉글랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Drury nasceu aproximadamente 1522, em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Drury, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Goldingham, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry aproximadamente 1552, em Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1595, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Drury родилась около 1522 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Drury было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Goldingham, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry около 1552 г. в местности хессетт, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 октября 1595 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Drury nació aproximadamente 1522, en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Drury, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Goldingham, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Sir Francis Bacon of Hessett Drewry aproximadamente 1552, en Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1595, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
